name: io.github.anish-i/lore
description: Local-first memory OS for AI agents: permissioned recall over your own notes (hybrid retrieval + rerank + knowledge graph), token-budgeted context packs, and per-agent durable memories with zero-friction self-provisioning. Human-readable storage, measured recall.

environment_variables.name: LORE_SCOPES
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated ACL scopes the agent may read

environment_variables.name: LORE_AGENT
environment_variables.description: Agent name — lore_remember writes land in agent:<name>

environment_variables.name: LORE_LOCAL_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Local API token from the Lore desktop app config

tools.name: lore_recall
tools.description: Token-budgeted, cited context pack for a task

tools.name: lore_remember
tools.description: Store a durable agent memory (redacted, scoped, capped)

tools.name: lore_ask
tools.description: Cited answer from the user's knowledge base
